門將羅美路最近把於英國的豪宅放售，間接證實了季後離開曼聯。羅美路（Sergio Romero）於2015年以自由身加盟曼聯，隨即於英國置業，與太太Eliana Guercio及孩子們居住。不過，這名阿根廷國腳最近把10000呎豪宅放盤，作價350萬鎊，如果月租則需要22萬鎊。

放售大屋這個舉動，可以看出羅美路已經肯定不會留在紅魔，將於今年夏天合約完結後離隊。事實上，他已經7個月沒有披甲，而且現時身在阿根廷與家人及愛犬享受生活。

34歲羅美路在曼聯第6個球季，合共上陣61場，贏過1次英足盃、1次英聯盃、1次社區盾、1次歐霸盃。雖然他長時間沒有比賽，但據知仍然有多家美職球會有興趣引入他。

門將羅美路最近把於英國的豪宅放售，間接證實了季後離開曼聯。羅美路（Sergio Romero）於2015年以自由身加盟曼聯，隨即於英國置業，與太太Eliana Guercio及孩子們居住。不過，這名阿根廷國腳最近把10000呎豪宅放盤，作價350萬鎊，如果月租則需要22萬鎊。

放售大屋這個舉動，可以看出羅美路已經肯定不會留在紅魔，將於今年夏天合約完結後離隊。事實上，他已經7個月沒有披甲，而且現時身在阿根廷與家人及愛犬享受生活。

34歲羅美路在曼聯第6個球季，合共上陣61場，贏過1次英足盃、1次英聯盃、1次社區盾、1次歐霸盃。雖然他長時間沒有比賽，但據知仍然有多家美職球會有興趣引入他。

曼聯很高興地宣佈，已經完成了費特的轉會。

在通過體檢後，球員與球會簽訂一份為期五年的合同，並附加一年的優先續約條款。

在烏克蘭聯賽，這名25歲的巴西中場贏得了許多球會的榮譽，其中就包括了三次聯賽冠軍。

談到費特的加盟，摩連奴表示：「費特能夠增強我們的中場實力，而這個方面是我們所需要的；他的創造力和傳球讓我們在比賽中變得更加多元化。很高興他能夠加盟我們球會，相信我們的球員會知道，他在球隊會發揮著多麼重要的作用。」

摩蛇又中￼

quote.msg: 冇傷兵關so蛇咩事? 佢做醫生?

輪換、訓練唔關佢事咩？
戰術e.g. 逼搶強度都有關

關咩事
v92 輪換多、訓練(鳩猜)、逼搶強度(弱)
so9 輪換少、訓練(例如?)、逼搶強度(中)
但v92 果年半隊傷喎

你點解釋

replies.msg:
蘇sir 一上任就話要主力操fit 班波，訓練強度高、體能夠fit 反而可以係正式比賽入面減少受傷機會

仲有蘇sir 引入運動科學數據分析球員狀態，你睇d球員訓練個陣戴住好似bra 個舊野就係用黎mon 住球員實時數據
蘇sir 可以跟據數據分配出場時間，例如岩岩對李城個場，佢就話普巴只可以踢60分鐘，所以就算落後緊都要換走佢

再者今季輪換唔算好少，跑動多個d位例如左閘、中場都有輪換，麥龜awb 福場上跑動相對較少都可以保存體力 (awb 助攻少過shaw／福唔使回防etc.)

當然bruno 休息係少嘅，佢唔傷點都有運氣成份，但總括而言我曼少傷兵蘇sir 同教練團唔會冇功勞

v92 輪換多、訓練(鳩猜)、逼搶強度(弱)
so9 輪換少、訓練(例如?)、逼搶強度(中)
但v92 果年半隊傷喎

你點解釋

蘇sir 一上任就話要主力操fit 班波，訓練強度高、體能夠fit 反而可以係正式比賽入面減少受傷機會

仲有蘇sir 引入運動科學數據分析球員狀態，你睇d球員訓練個陣戴住好似bra 個舊野就係用黎mon 住球員實時數據
蘇sir 可以跟據數據分配出場時間，例如岩岩對李城個場，佢就話普巴只可以踢60分鐘，所以就算落後緊都要換走佢

再者今季輪換唔算好少，跑動多個d位例如左閘、中場都有輪換，麥龜awb 福場上跑動相對較少都可以保存體力 (awb 助攻少過shaw／福唔使回防etc.)

當然bruno 休息係少嘅，佢唔傷點都有運氣成份，但總括而言我曼少傷兵蘇sir 同教練團唔會冇功勞

replies.msg: 依家先知個件背心仔嘅功用

Van Gaal’s dossier of A4 sheets shows his team played almost twice as many long balls as West Ham – 83 against 45 – during the 1-1 draw at Upton Park and that 24.2% of their passes were of that manner compared to 22.5% for their opponents. However, the United manager argued Allardyce had unfairly misrepresented the statistics and pointed out 41 of United’s long passes were actually hit sideways rather than to their attackers. In that case, his argument was that West Ham played a considerably higher percentage of long balls forward according to their number of total passes – at 71.1% compared with United’s 49.9%.

The dossier also included diagrams of where every single pass had been aimed – successful ones highlighted in blue, unsuccessful in red – and a separate page for the period after the 76th minute when Marouane Fellaini was brought on. Van Gaal took exception when journalists pressed him on whether he had abandoned United’s traditions to accommodate Fellaini as a target man. “Because of Big Sam, you are talking in behind,” he said.

Van Gaal’s dossier of A4 sheets shows his team played almost twice as many long balls as West Ham – 83 against 45 – during the 1-1 draw at Upton Park and that 24.2% of their passes were of that manner compared to 22.5% for their opponents. However, the United manager argued Allardyce had unfairly misrepresented the statistics and pointed out 41 of United’s long passes were actually hit sideways rather than to their attackers. In that case, his argument was that West Ham played a considerably higher percentage of long balls forward according to their number of total passes – at 71.1% compared with United’s 49.9%.

The dossier also included diagrams of where every single pass had been aimed – successful ones highlighted in blue, unsuccessful in red – and a separate page for the period after the 76th minute when Marouane Fellaini was brought on. Van Gaal took exception when journalists pressed him on whether he had abandoned United’s traditions to accommodate Fellaini as a target man. “Because of Big Sam, you are talking in behind,” he said.

應該係離隊

https://www.theguardian.com/football/2021/mar/24/nicky-butt-quits-manchester-united-coaching-staff-to-pursue-new-challenge

Nicky Butt has stepped down as Manchester United’s head of first-team development to pursue “a new professional challenge”.

Butt has spent nine years in coaching and player development positions at the club’s academy, playing a key role in overseeing the progress of Marcus Rashford, Scott McTominay, Axel Tuanzebe, Dean Henderson and Mason Greenwood into the first team.

“Having come through the academy myself to play almost 400 games for Manchester United, it has been an absolute privilege to come back and work with a new generation of talent making that same journey,” the former midfielder told the club’s website.

“I’m proud of the role everyone on the staff plays in giving our young footballers the best possible chance of fulfilling their potential, and the results are clear to see in the increased number of homegrown players reaching the first team.

“I already know from my playing days how difficult it is to leave Manchester United, but it feels like the right moment for a new professional challenge and I look forward to exploring opportunities that build on the great experiences I’ve had here over the past nine years.”

The manager, Ole Gunnar Solskjær, said Butt had been “a great source of guidance and inspiration to our academy players” and would “always be welcome back”.

This month United revamped their backroom setup, with John Murtough appointed to a new role of football director and the former midfielder Darren Fletcher promoted to technical director.
